column5: Target_Sentence_Rule
column6: Question_Template
column7: Distractor_Rule
column8: Question_Text
column14: Explanation

column5: 尋找第一段中描述地點、環境的句子。
column6: Where does the story happen? / Where is [Character]?
column7: 使用文章中出現過的其他地點，或常見但未提及的地點。
column8: Where does the story happen?
column14: Paragraph 1 says 'Tom was visiting his grandpa''s farm.'

column5: 尋找第一段中介紹人物身分、職業或關係的句子。
column6: Who is [Character]?
column7: 將文章中其他人物的關係或職業張冠李戴。
column8: Who is Mrs Green?
column14: Paragraph 1 says 'Mrs Green, Emma's teacher, walked into the classroom.'

column5: 尋找第一段中描述時間、天氣或季節的句子。
column6: When did the story take place? / What time of day was it?
column7: 使用不符合上下文的時間點（如早上改成晚上）。
column8: When did the story take place?
column14: Paragraph 1 says 'The sun was just coming up.'

column5: 尋找第一段中列出主要參與者的句子。
column6: Who are the characters in the story?
column7: 混入未出場的角色或只出現過一次的配角。
column8: Who are the characters in the story?
column14: The text introduces Mary and her sister Jane.

column5: 尋找包含具體事物、喜好、活動的細節句。
column6: What is [Character]'s favourite [Noun]? / What did [Character] [Verb]?
column7: 使用屬於其他角色的事物，或文章中出現過的其他名詞。
column8: What is the boy's favourite sport?
column14: Paragraph 2 says his favourite sport is basketball.

column5: 尋找包含時間長度、數量、程度的細節句。
column6: How many [Noun] did [Character] [Verb]? / How long did it take?
column7: 竄改文章中的數字或時間長度。
column8: How many hours did the trip take?
column14: The text says the journey took three hours.

column5: 尋找中間段落描述角色移動目的地或物品位置的句子。
column6: Where did [Character] go? / Where is the [Noun]?
column7: 使用文章中提到的其他地點進行混淆。
column8: Where did Tom and his dad go last weekend?
column14: Paragraph 2 says 'They went to the cinema to watch a movie.'

column5: 鎖定特定段落，找出3個正確事實與1個錯誤事實。
column6: Which sentence is NOT true about [Subject]?
column7: 錯誤選項必須使用文章中的單字重新組合，使其語意與文章相反。
column8: Which sentence is NOT true?
column14: The text says Tom is an only child, so he doesn't have a sister.

column5: 鎖定特定事物，找出1個正確事實與3個錯誤事實。
column6: Which of the following is true about [Subject]?
column7: 錯誤選項包含未提及的特徵或相反的描述。
column8: Which of the following is true about the spaceship?
column14: The text describes the spaceship as shiny and made of metal.

column5: 尋找 it, they, them 等代名詞，且前一句有明確指代對象。
column6: In paragraph [X]
column7: what does '[Pronoun]' refer to?
column8: 使用該代名詞附近出現的其他名詞（同性別或同單複數）。
column9: In paragraph 2, what does 'it' refer to?
column14: The new bike
column15: The sentence before says 'He got a new bike. It was red.'

column5: 尋找描述角色表情、動作或遇到特殊事件的句子。
column6: How does [Character] probably feel at the end/when [Event]?
column7: 使用相反的情緒，或該事件中其他角色的情緒。
column8: How does Jack probably feel at the end?
column14: He is smiling and jumping, which means he is excited.

column5: 尋找角色狀態（如tired, happy）並推導其前因。
column6: Why did [Character] feel [Adjective]?
column7: 使用符合常理但文章未提及的原因。
column8: Why did the character feel tired?
column14: He had just finished a long race.

column2: 人格特質推論題 (Character Trait Inference)
column5: 尋找角色具體助人、調皮或勇敢的行為句子。
column6: What does [Character]'s action tell us about him/her?
column7: 使用與該行為無關的特質，或相反的特質。
column8: What does the boy's action tell us about him?
column14: He helped the old lady cross the street.

column5: 尋找角色特殊行為（如hide, run away）並推導原因。
column6: Why did [Character] [Action]?
column7: 使用字面上合理但在故事中不成立的原因。
column8: Why did the girl hide?
column14: The text mentions they were playing hide-and-seek.

column5: 尋找某個動作導致另一個角色反應的句子。
column6: How did [Character A]'s [Action] affect [Character B]?
column7: 描述相反的反應或無關的結果。
column8: How did the boy's shouting affect the baby?
column14: The loud noise woke the baby up and made it cry.

column5: 尋找帶有 because, so 或隱含因果邏輯的句子。
column6: Why was the [Noun] [Adjective]? / Why did [Event] happen?
column7: 使用文章中其他事件的原因進行混淆。
column8: Why was the shop closed?
column14: Paragraph 3 says 'The shop was closed because it was Sunday.'

column5: 尋找帶有 first, then, next, finally 等順序詞的段落。
column6: What did [Character] do first/next?
column7: 打亂文章中的事件發生順序作為錯誤選項。
column8: What did Anna do first?
column14: The text says 'First, Anna ate breakfast. Then, she packed her bag.'

column5: 尋找文章中的對話，或根據情境設計合理的應答。
column6: What did [Character A] say when [Character B] asked [Question]?
column7: 使用語法正確但答非所問的句子。
column8: What did the guide say when Tom asked a question?
column14: The guide praised Tom for asking about the dinosaur.

column5: 尋找日常交際用語或提問。
column6: [Character] asks: [Question]?
column7: 答非所問，或時態、人稱錯誤的選項。
column8: Paul asks: Would you like some juice?
column14: When someone asks 'Would you like...', we answer 'Yes, please' or 'No, thank you.'

column2: 語法與字彙克漏字 (Grammar & Vocabulary Cloze)
column5: 挖空文章中的比較級、最高級或常見詞彙。
column6: The [Noun] was ___ than they thought.
column7: 使用同義但詞性錯誤的字，或不符合文法的變化形。
column8: The museum was ___ than they thought.
column14: We use the comparative form 'bigger' with 'than'.

column5: 挖空帶有明確時間副詞（如 last year, tomorrow）的動詞。
column6: [Time expression] we ___ to [Place].
column7: 提供相同動詞的其他時態（現在式、進行式）。
column8: Last year we ___ to London.
column14: 'Last year' means we must use the past tense 'went'.

column5: 挖空表示地點、時間或空間關係的介系詞。
column6: The children played ___ the garden.
column7: 提供其他常見但在此語境中錯誤的介系詞（如 on
column8: at
column14: to
column16: We use 'in' for enclosed spaces like a garden.

column5: 分析故事结局，總結傳遞的核心價值。
column6: What is the theme of the story?
column7: 使用文章中的枝微末節作為選項，或與本文無關的道理。
column8: What is the theme of the story?
column14: The story shows how friends help each other in difficult times.

column5: 尋找故事中主角遇到的主要困難或衝突。
column6: What was the problem in the story?
column7: 描述故事中微不足道的小麻煩，或未發生的問題。
column8: What was the problem in the story?
column14: The main conflict was that they couldn't find their way without the map.

column5: 尋找故事結尾如何解決上述困難的句子。
column6: How was the problem solved?
column7: 提出一個合理但故事中並非如此解決的方案。
column8: How was the problem solved?
column14: The story ends with a police officer showing them the right way.

column5: 總結全篇核心事件與主角。
column6: What is the best name for the story?
column7: 使用只涵蓋單一段落內容的標題，或完全無關的標題。
column8: What is the best name for the story?
column14: Look at the whole story. It is about a boy finding his lost dog.

column5: 總結主角學到的教訓。
column6: What is the most important lesson in this text?
column7: 提出負面或與故事發展相悖的教訓。
column8: What is the most important lesson in this text?
column10: Never go outside in the rain
column14: At the end of the story, the boy learned that telling the truth is important.

column5: 尋找文章中的代名詞 (I, we, he, she) 來判斷視角。
column6: Who is telling the story?
column7: 列出故事中的其他配角，或第三人稱觀察者。
column8: Who is telling the story?
column14: The story uses 'I', and we know the boy's name is Tom.

column5: 分析整篇文章的文體（敘事、說明、說服）。
column6: Why did the author write this text?
column7: 提出與文章文體不符的目的（如將故事說成廣告）。
column8: Why did the author write this text?
column9: To tell a story about a trip
column10: To explain how to do homework
column11: To sell tickets to a museum
column13: To tell a story about a trip
column14: The text is a narrative about a family's holiday.

column2: 同義字/字義配對題 (Vocabulary Matching)
column5: 挑選 Flyers 單字表中的形容詞或動詞，尋找其英文釋義。
column6: Which word means '[Definition]'?
column7: 提供拼寫相似或詞性相同的其他單字。
column8: Which word means 'not expensive'?
column14: 'Cheap' means it does not cost a lot of money.
